title: Library Catalog Schema
description: JSON Schema for library.yaml — the catalog file for the cognovis-library private skill distribution system.

default_dirs.description: Default installation directories per primitive type and harness.

skills.description: Directory mappings for skills across harnesses.

agents.description: Directory mappings for agents across harnesses.

prompts.description: Directory mappings for prompts/commands across harnesses.

library.description: The catalog of available skills, agents, and prompts.

guardrails.description: Capability matrix per harness (stub — populated by CL-xcm).

standards.description: Storage convention and loader-mechanism reference (stub — populated by CL-v56).

mcp_servers.description: Canonical MCP server model definitions (stub — populated by CL-mfz).

marketplaces.description: Third-party source references for external libraries (stub — populated by CL-7ii).

dir_list.description: A list of named directory mappings (key: path pairs).

additionalProperties.description: Path to the directory (absolute, relative, or ~ prefix).

source_ref.description: Source reference for a catalog entry — local path or GitHub URL.

typed_dependency.description: A typed dependency reference using 'type:name' format.

base_entry.description: Common fields shared by all catalog entry types.

name.description: Unique identifier for this catalog entry.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this entry provides.

source.description: Location of the source file (local path or GitHub URL).

requires.description: Typed dependencies that must be installed before this entry.

version.description: Optional semantic version or tag of the entry.

tags.description: Optional tags for search and filtering.

skill_entry.description: A skill catalog entry with install path information.

install_path.description: Override the default install directory for this skill.

harness.description: Target harness for this skill (claude, codex, or both).

agent_entry.description: An agent catalog entry with format-translation hints.

install_path.description: Override the default install directory for this agent.

format.description: Agent file format (for translation hints between harnesses).

install_path.description: Override the default install directory for this prompt.
